entities.name: David
entities.context: Content expert and design partner capable of co-specifying workflows and pressure-testing whether systems support real-world networking behavior

entities.name: Design partner
entities.context: Collaborative role for someone who can co-specify workflows and edge cases, beyond just content expertise

entities.name: Workflows
entities.context: Processes and systems to be co-specified with domain expert input

entities.name: Edge cases
entities.context: Boundary conditions requiring real-world behavior testing rather than theoretical assumptions

entities.name: Assistive ally
entities.context: Desired UX paradigm where the system feels helpful rather than like intrusive surveillance

relationships.context: David serves as a design partner, not just a content expert
Can help co-specify workflows based on real-world behavior
Can help pressure-test and identify edge cases
Maintaining David's trust requires UX that feels like an assistive ally
